intent_tree: {"将音频中的语音转换为文字并整理格式": {"将语音转换为文字": {}, "根据静默间隔分割段落并整理顺序": {"根据静默间隔检测主标题和小标题": {}, "提取音频中的重要关键词": {"分析关键词的情感倾向": {"生成情感分析报告": {}}}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "加载必要的依赖库"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "初始化语音识别模型（Whisper）"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "预处理音频文件，转换为16kHz单声道格式"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "使用语音识别模型处理音频，生成带时间戳的文本块"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "解析文本块，检测静默间隔以分割段落"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "根据段落长度判断是否为主标题或小标题"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "优化文本格式，去除多余空格和重复标点"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "将整理后的文本保存为Markdown文件"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "基于TF-IDF算法提取音频中的重要关键词"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "在输出文档末尾添加重要关键词章节"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "对提取的关键词进行情感分析"}, {"id": "Node12", "description": "生成包含情感分析结果的报告"}, {"id": "Node13", "description": "将情感分析报告附加到最终输出文档"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "initialize"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "preprocess"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "transcribe"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "parseChunks"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "detectTitles"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "formatText"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "saveOutput"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node9", "type": "extractKeywords"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "appendKeywordsSection"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node8", "type": "includeInFinalOutput"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node11", "type": "analyzeSentiment"}, {"source": "Node11", "target": "Node12", "type": "generateReport"}, {"source": "Node12", "target": "Node13", "type": "appendReportToOutput"}, {"source": "Node13", "target": "Node8", "type": "finalizeOutput"}]}
